prompt: A photorealistic corporate photograph of a man resembling {argument name="person name" default="Sam Altman"} wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="black long-sleeve sweater"}, standing in profile and writing on a large whiteboard with a black marker. The whiteboard features clear, handwritten black text reading "{argument name="line 1 text" default="Model: ChatGPT"}" with "{argument name="line 2 text" default="Company: OpenAI"}" written directly below it. In the bottom right corner, smaller text reads "{argument name="signature text" default="- Sam Altman CEO, OpenAI"}". The scene is set in a bright, modern office with soft natural lighting and a softly blurred background.
translatedPrompt: 一张照片级逼真的图像，展示了 {argument name="subject" default="Sam Altman"} 身穿黑色长袖毛衣，侧身站在明亮的现代办公室里，用黑色记号笔在大型白色白板上书写。白板上写着清晰工整的黑色手写大字。第一行写着 "{argument name="line 1 text" default="Model: ChatGPT"}"。下方第二行写着 "{argument name="line 2 text" default="Company: OpenAI"}"。在白板的右下角，有一个签名 "- {argument name="signature name" default="Sam Altman"}"，下方直接写着头衔 "{argument name="signature title" default="CEO, OpenAI"}"。

breakdown.creativeCore: 男子在白板上书写：生成一张照片级逼真的图像，展示一个人在办公室白板上书写自定义文本和签名。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: natural light]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
